// note: Consumers of the vendored engine (atlas-app + the composite packages basemap/data/geo/tools) extend this AFTER tsconfig.base.json so `@atlasdraw/{common,element,excalidraw,math,utils}` resolve to their BUILT declarations (dist/types) instead of source. This stops every consumer's `tsc` from dragging the whole vendored engine's source into its program (the TS6059 rootDir cascade + upstream-fork type noise) and lets it typecheck against the vendored public API only. Requires `yarn build:packages` to have produced dist/types first (the gate does this). Base keeps pointing at source so the vendored packages' own `gen:types` self-build still works from a clean tree.
